channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Lakeland's Midtown redevelopment plan focuses on businesses, housing, history
item.description: Lakeland’s Midtown could see major changes under a new plan from the Community Redevelopment Agency (CRA).

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 'This is personal': Neighbors join Clearwater initiative to mitigate stormwater as City looks to grow program
item.description: The City of Clearwater is looking for neighbors to adopt 5,500 drains around the City as they look to grow its "Adopt-A-Drain" program, a way for neighbors to play a role in mitigating stormwater.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: city council] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tampa City Council faces off in friendly karaoke competition
item.description: Tampa City Council members swapped city business for microphones Friday night during a friendly karaoke competition at the Babe Zaharias Clubhouse.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Severe storms spark major ground delay at Tampa International Airport
item.description: Severe thunderstorms forced a temporary ground stop at Tampa International Airport on Friday, disrupting more than 45% of flights before weather cleared in the afternoon.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Developer buys Westshore Plaza as major mixed-use overhauls are coming to Tampa properties
item.description: Several major Tampa commercial properties are moving closer to dramatic transformations after a flurry of real estate transactions and redevelopment rollouts. Westshore Plaza, Britton Plaza and Stetson University are all undergoing major changes as developers look to replicate modern mixed-use concepts.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Hillsborough deputy arrested for stalking driver after traffic stop: Officials
item.description: A Hillsborough County deputy was arrested Friday for stalking a driver he pulled over during a July traffic stop.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Former Manatee County EMS deputy chief arrested after being linked to child sexual abuse material: Deputies
item.description: A Manatee County EMS deputy chief was arrested after he was linked to child sexual abuse material, according to the Manatee County Sheriff's Office.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Unsettled Pattern Takes Hold Through the Weekend
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida Lottery Mega Millions, Fantasy 5 results for July 17, 2026

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Polk County firefighters receive long-awaited fourth shift to reduce burnout
item.description: Polk County firefighters are celebrating a major victory after advocating for a change to their schedule. Firefighters are getting a long-awaited fourth shift, also called D shift.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News Tonight - Top Headlines and Weather for July 17
item.description: Deputy arrested on stalking charge, Florida mom battles Medicaid denials for special needs son, US escalates Iran attacks, more rain this weekend

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Former North Port police officer remembered after his untimely death
